texto: We live in that grave, in those clothes, in the pressure between nothing and everything, we live by perpetual movement from place to place but we want oh we so much want to escape to say it all to come home at last to the right place our rightful place our rightful space. As if that was possible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gabriel Josipovici: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “We live in that grave, in those clothes, in the pressure between nothing and everything, we live …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, home, living pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de living e place.
